name: Button Link
description: Low-emphasis text-style action for secondary or tertiary flows.

iconLeading.description: Shows a leading icon left of the label.

iconLeadingSwap.description: Icon instance to render in the leading slot.

iconTrailing.description: Shows a trailing icon right of the label.

iconTrailingSwap.description: Icon instance to render in the trailing slot.

do: Use for lower-priority actions or inline action patterns
dont: Don't use as the primary call to action in a section
Don't style like a navigation link — this triggers an action, not a page change

accessibility.keyboard: Tab to focus, Enter or Space to activate. Must preserve clear focus indication and sufficient contrast in all states.
